boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. CAL-GAC-087 indicates pending calibration pack CP-77 for GD-4 at P2 under RC-12 on 2026-06-28. STD-GAC-087-P requires an exact calibration-status class match before activation. The 082-style status-class trap persists. Escalate for defect resolution.
